description: Default port documented as 3456 in zh-CN but 8080 in EN start.md; one value is incorrect
suggested_fix: Audit actual default in packages/cli source and update the incorrect doc set to match

description: Status example output shows port 3456 in zh-CN but 8080 in EN status.md; same root cause as start.md mismatch
suggested_fix: Align status example output port with start.md after confirming actual default

description: Router manifest example uses 'openai:gpt-4' (colon separator) instead of correct 'openai,gpt-4' (comma separator)
suggested_fix: Change '"default": "openai:gpt-4"' to '"default": "openai,gpt-4"' to match actual CCR router format

description: Related command link '/docs/cli/commands/status' missing '/zh' locale prefix; navigates zh-CN users to English page
Related command link '/docs/cli/commands/status' missing locale prefix in current zh-CN doc; same bug as backup version, not fixed on promotion
npm publish to public registry for @musistudio/llms without provenance attestation or OTP enforcement; compromised CI credentials enable malicious package release
suggested_fix: Add --provenance flag and gate execution with a CI environment check before publish

description: npm publish to public registry for @CCR/cli without provenance attestation; same risk surface as line 65
suggested_fix: Add --provenance flag and CI-only guard; consider requiring OTP or publish token scope restriction

description: docker push to Docker Hub without content signing (DOCKER_CONTENT_TRUST); compromised credentials enable silent image replacement
suggested_fix: Set DOCKER_CONTENT_TRUST=1 before push and gate docker push to CI-only execution context

description: docker push of 'latest' tag to Docker Hub without content signing; 'latest' is the most widely pulled tag, making unsigned push highest-impact
suggested_fix: Sign images with Docker Content Trust or cosign; require CI context guard before any docker push

description: All four devDependencies use '^' semver ranges (@types/node, esbuild, shx, typescript); minor/patch bumps can silently alter build output or introduce compromised transitive deps
suggested_fix: Pin to exact versions and rely on pnpm lockfile for reproducible CI builds

description: Commands ccr stop, ccr restart, ccr code, ccr ui, and ccr activate have no output or 'produces no output' note; users cannot verify expected behavior
suggested_fix: Add an Output section for each command showing sample output, or note 'Produces no output on success' for silent commands

description: zh-CN translation of other.md inherits the same missing output coverage for all five auxiliary commands
suggested_fix: Mirror the output examples added to EN other.md once that fix is applied

description: 'background: Background tasks (typically lightweight models)' uses 'typically' without specifying which model tier or concrete example qualifies
suggested_fix: Replace with specific guidance, e.g. 'typically haiku-class models (e.g. claude-haiku-4-5)'

description: Manifest example uses 'api_base_url': 'https://api.openai.com/v1' (bare) while EN and zh-CN current versions use '/v1/chat/completions'; backup has drifted
suggested_fix: Update api_base_url in example to 'https://api.openai.com/v1/chat/completions' to match other versions and actual OpenAI endpoint

description: EN start.md documents default port 8080; zh-CN start.md documents 3456; same binary, same option, one is wrong — affects start.md and status.md simultaneously
suggested_fix: grep for default port in packages/cli/src and update the incorrect doc set; likely the zh-CN was updated for a port change that EN missed

description: Backup directory (dated 20260101_205603) in tracked repo contains preset.md and statusline.md that have diverged from current: wrong Router separator, wrong api_base_url, missing locale links
suggested_fix: Remove backup directory from git tracking or add to .gitignore; backup artifacts accumulate drift and confuse automated scanners
